title: Communauté de communes de Varenne et Scie
summary: The Communauté de communes de Varenne et Scie is a former intercommunality in the Seine-Maritime département of the Normandy region of north-western France. It was created on January 1, 2002. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes Terroir de Caux in January 2017.
text:
The Communauté de communes de Varenne et Scie is a former intercommunality in the Seine-Maritime département of the Normandy region of north-western France. It was created on January 1, 2002. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes Terroir de Caux in January 2017.

Participants
The Communauté de communes comprised the following 22 communes:
